Instance.BindInstances: icmp_ln29_fu_382_p2 icmp_ln30_fu_397_p2 add_ln29_fu_402_p2 select_ln29_fu_408_p3 add_ln29_1_fu_416_p2 select_ln29_1_fu_422_p3 first_iter_0_fu_438_p2 icmp_fu_454_p2 cmp105_fu_460_p2 addr_cmp41_fu_482_p2 reuse_select42_fu_588_p3 addr_cmp_fu_491_p2 reuse_select_fu_598_p3 icmp_ln53_fu_517_p2 and_ln53_fu_804_p2 sub_ln56_fu_686_p2 add_ln57_fu_714_p2 sub_ln55_fu_724_p2 sub_ln59_fu_746_p2 sub_ln60_fu_764_p2 sub_ln61_fu_782_p2 sub_ln63_fu_822_p2 abs_gx_fu_827_p3 sub_ln64_fu_846_p2 abs_gy_fu_851_p3 sum_mag_fu_862_p2 output_pixel_fu_872_p2 output_pixel_2_fu_877_p2 out_stream_TDATA icmp_ln82_fu_523_p2 out_pixel_last_fu_528_p2 add_ln30_fu_534_p2 icmp_ln30_1_fu_618_p2 sobel_accel_stream_stream_axis_0_int_int_int_line_buf_1_U sobel_accel_stream_stream_axis_0_int_int_int_line_buf_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
width, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of width,
height, 0x18, 32, W, Data signal of height,
threshold, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of threshold,

table.keys: Interface, Direction, Register Mode, TDATA, TDEST, TID, TKEEP, TLAST, TREADY, TSTRB, TUSER, TVALID
Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Info
